title: Host Firewall with UFW
description: Enable UFW, allow SSH and a web service, and verify the effective ruleset. This scenario is available from the online catalog only — download the pack here if you do not have it locally.
tasks: Allow OpenSSH and HTTP (port 80) before enabling the firewall
Enable UFW and confirm the rules you expect
Document the numbered rule list with ufw status numbered

objectivesPublic.label: Allow SSH and HTTP
objectivesPublic.text: Add UFW rules for OpenSSH and port 80/tcp.
objectivesPublic.hint: Use ufw allow with the service name for SSH and the port/proto form for the web listener.

objectivesPublic.label: Enable UFW
objectivesPublic.text: Turn UFW on and confirm it reports active.
objectivesPublic.hint: Enable non-interactively if your environment supports it, then run ufw status.
